# Civ Modding Central

> Civilization V modding workspace with guided planning, generators, references, art tools, packaging helpers, and publishing support.

Civ Modding Central provides guided planning, template generators, a pattern library, schema and Lua references, art helpers, packaging tools, community resources, and the standalone CMC Workshop Uploader for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

## Main pages

- Home: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/
- Guided Planner: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/guided-planner
- Template Generators: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/template-generators
- Pattern Library: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/pattern-library
- Schema Browser: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/schema-browser
- Lua API Explorer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/lua-api-explorer
- Civ Icon Maker: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ-icon-maker
- CMC Workshop Uploader: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/workshop-uploader
- DDS Converter: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/dds-converter
- .modinfo Builder: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/modinfo-builder
- .civ5mod Ziper: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/civ5mod-ziper
- Map Viewer: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/map-viewer
- Community Links: https://civmoddingcentral.dev/community-links

## What the site offers

- Guided civ-mod planning from concept through release
- Template generators for common Civ V content scaffolds
- Pattern recipes for repeatable data and Lua implementation work
- Searchable schema tables, columns, row data, and Lua/GameEvents references
- Civ icon and DDS tooling for UI and art pipelines
- Desktop upload and update guidance for the standalone cross-platform CMC Workshop Uploader app
- DDS conversion for Civ V UI, icon, unit, and terrain textures
- `.modinfo` file generation and editing, including MD5 handling
- `.civ5mod` browser-side packaging for Civilization V mods
- Interactive Civilization V map viewing and community map exploration
- Curated links to Civ V modding communities and references

## Audience

- Civilization V modders
- First-time civ creators who need guided workflows and reference links
- Civ V scenario and map creators
- Workshop maintainers publishing and updating Steam items
- Modders working across Windows, macOS, and Linux
- Artists preparing DDS or icon assets for Civ V
- Players browsing community maps and modding resources
